image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: What if I told you ecosystems are more like webs than chains?
Context visual: Food chains simplify relationships into a linear path. But nature is much messier.
Escalation visual: Picture this: a spider spins a web. Every strand connects to multiple insects, not just one.
Evidence visual: In a food web, one animal can play multiple roles. A rabbit isn’t just food; it can also be a pollinator.
Payoff visual: Understanding food webs helps us grasp ecosystem health. A stronger web means a healthier planet.
Cta visual: Want to dive deeper into ecology? Like and follow for more insights!
